_schema: task-ledger TEMPLATE for nv-generate-ct-rflow — set perk, fill record_store + the vars the perk declares.

vars.CONFIG_INFER: path to a config_infer override JSON, or the literal 'default' for the upstream config verbatim
vars.NV_GENERATE_ROOT: absolute path to the cloned NVIDIA-Medtech/NV-Generate-CTMR repo (with downloaded rflow-ct weights + mask datasets)
